star_1.text: it is horrendous. there is ads every second and it's super laggy which is crazy for an offline game. not only do you have an ad EVERY time you restart, you need to watch an ad to just press on the music! not to mention that each ad is a minute long! Every time I tried to play a more difficult level, it lags and I lose. why is a simple piano game this laggy! this game is just a money grab, don't play it.

ad. ad. ad. what's that?- oh! another ad... there's a difference between needing to keep the app running for free, and just being greedy. a new ad LITERALLY every song, every button I click- AD 💀 even the rip offs don't have that many and they still have up and running 😂 edit: 1000 TIMES WORSE THAN THE RIP OFFS! you cant do battles or features like that unless your not signed in (which you will receive no reward) or signed in on ONLY one device. my old 1 broke. and NO way to log out 💀

its gotten really hard to play, I come back to the game every few years or so and now its very annoying to use, sure adds are important for free games to make some money but the sheer amount is insane, want to play a single game, nope add, already have it and want to replay it? add. Halfway through, add. starting up the game, add. its insane. additionally, the bar moving up is also annoying, sure its a good idea but it jarringly moving up ¾'s of the way up the screen is really annoying.

I have no idea how this app has over three stars. Everytime I try to do anything on this app, it gives me an ad. I win, ad. I lose, ad. I want to play any song, ad. And, the ads take forever to load the x, if at all. I got stuck on a temu ad for almost 30 minutes; everytime I clicked the x it just replayed the video. Not only that, but half of the time I "die" I actually didn't mess up, or the audio was so off that it messed me up. I used to love this game, but it keeps getting worse and worse.

ads are way to intrusive, almost predatory, to attempt get you to purchase a subscription you might forget about. Go play Festival in Fortnite, it's better anyway. this app is so far behind on everything that made Guitar Hero and RockBand actually good it's comical. This app was designed to be a leech. Uninstalled after I missed the first note and had to sit through a 2 minute advertisement for a 'free' revive.

This game has far too many ads. I can't even play a single song—which is like 1-6 minutes depending on whether you fail or make it all the way to the end—without one afterwards. Not to mention if you miss a single tile you have to reset or watch more ads. Guess what, you also have to watch ads to open the vast majority of songs. It's just too many. Plenty of other games operate fine with way less.

Decent game, every song required an ad to unlock but after you play the song like normal, play it again slightly faster, and faster, and faster. I haven't made it past four bit you can barely tell what song it is, and after every death you are forced to watch an ad and can watch an extra to get back to a checkpoint. The aesthetics are nice, controls are good, song choices aren't the best but there are a few good ones.

I've had this application ever since I was nine, and I loved it! ...on my iPad. Ever since I downloaded this application on my phone, I've been stuck on TWO SONGS. And this is because an advertisement is never "available," and the one time the advertisement actually worked, it was towards the "three ads for one song" thing. This was really been annoying me and I would really appreciate it is you would change this. Also, I have to admit the songs have gotten more in-tune with the notes. Thanks!:)

The game has wayyyy too many ads. For example, if you LOSE, you get an ad. Wouldn't recommend this game also because the tiles don't even match up with the song, and that just annoys me soooooo much. I'll reinstall this game when it fixes the 2 mistakes. If you didn't get what I was saying, the 2 mistakes are too many ads, and the 2nd the tiles don't match with the song. This is just my opinion, so don't get personal if you like the game.

Way too many ads!!!! If you fail? Ad. If you win? Ad. In between difficulty spikes? Ad. Not to mention you only get 2 songs and all the rest are unlocked with... you guessed it, more ads. I spent more time looking at ads than I did playing the freaking game. I downloaded the game to play the game, not to watch ads only to play for 4 seconds and get another ad. Plus, the select is small. I used to play this game a lot when I was younger, but back then, you had a wide selection of songs.

Honestly it just feels like there's not much in it, especially given the fact that you have to watch an ad after every song. I also really don't like some of the covers they have. For example "Sunflower" sounds terrible. Just a worse version of beatstar if you ask me. That one has no ads, feels like a game, and is much more innovative than this app.

Honestly, it has the potential to be a very fun game. But the amount of ads ruins that completely. It also has a major issue with recognizing when you hit the double notes, making you lose the game and either you can watch an ad to keep trying, or you can watch an ad to try a new song 😒 Want to play a song? Ad. Miss a note and want to try again? Ad. Open the app at all? AD. AD. AD. I understand that's how free games get money, but this is just ridiculous. Cut it down and it would be fun.

I used to play this, and loved it. Redownloading it, I found they got rid of everything I liked, adding so many ads and just making it 'popular' songs, rather than the ones I enjoyed and played it for. Immediately got rid of. Would NOT recommend unless all you ever want to play on the piano are Ed Sheeran and others of the sort.

Y Got to say I am highly disappointed in what this app has become. I used to love this game it used to be one of my favorites but it's just turned into a cash grab game like everything else you literally can't even play any songs without watching an ad first then you get an ad after you play and if you want to play without ads you have to sign up for a monthly subscription which is just absolutely ridiculous you used to be able to earn points in game to unlock songs...sad from 5 to 1 stars...

It doesn't register me tapping the buttons. I can hear and feel my fingers hitting the screen, but it still ends the song saying i missed one. I am positive im not missing, but it says i am, and it's very frustrating to have to basically pound my screen to play. Without pounding the screen, it doesn't register the push. There are way too many ads!! After every song, whether you complete it or not, there is an ad. It is very annoying and repetitive. I understand needing ads but that is overkill.

Ads/Pay to play... I recently got this game because I got addicted to playing "Piano Keys" in Dave and Busters, (highscore is 88). This game is great and all but it is a must that you watch ads! Half the game is about the ads...You can either pay $8 a month, which is absurd, or watch ads for every time you want to play a song. I can one shot 3 crown all the songs in one try, but it isn't worth my time watching 30 second ads when I could be 1/4 through the song...

Guys, don't download this. All they want is your money. Before you even start playing the game they ask if you would like to make a subscription (which is about 24 USD a month, not cheap) and the only way to unlock songs is by watching an ad or by subscribing. Gameplay is fairly fun, similar to piano tiles 2 by Cheetah Play, but the massive paywall destroys everything... They did add an ig currency but you can't unlock any songs with it

I really enjoyed in initially, until I was bombarded with the extreme amount of ads. Everytime you press the wrong key, ad! Everytime you win or lose in the competitive part of the game, ads! Want a reward? Watch a ad! Oh you don't want to? We'll force ya anyway! Anywho, good game, but the developers absolutely ruined the quality by implementing so many ads. Hope this will help people from wasting their time !!

I remember when I played about a year ago.Completely different back then.At that time, I loved the game because it DIDN'T have all the "popular" songs.Now that's all there is, and the original piano songs are no longer the same.For example, the song Romantic sounds nice and easy in the preview, but plays a completely different and very difficult song when you select it to play.I used to love this game so much, but after seeing the changes, as well as all the new advertising, I am disgusted. 0/10

This game is good in all. Kind of a good selection of songs. Well at least you think it is tell you click on it then its some random person that sounds nothing like the actual singer singing it. There is also a lot of glitches and bugs like I have stopped multiple times for "not clicking the tile" when I literally clicked the tile. And there are WAY too many ads after every song there is an ad. Its ridiculous. And I don't think we should unlock 1 song at a time that's also really stupid.

star_2.text: they have limited amounts of song options. the ads are awful. you get an ads to open the game, starting a song, and ending one. and if you want to watch an add to start at the point you lost at. hope you don't miss click the x bc it send you out of the app. and you have to start the process all over again. I just want to play one hard song and I'm watching ads and jumping through hoops more to just play it for like 5 seconds.

the game itself is entertaining, but the amount of ads they force you to watch makes the game completely unplayable. I uninstalled after 10 minutes of using the app because half of that time was just spent watching unskippable ads. Every time you want to play a song, every time you finish a song, literally every, like, minute you are fed a 30 second ad. Not to mention that most of the songs are bad covers of the actual ones and personally I couldn't barely find songs of artists i like. ex. sza

I do like the game, but it kept freezing or was stuck on what I believe to be a infinite loading screen after 3 stars on a song, forcing me to close the app completely and losing progress. I only managed to get through 1 of 6 songs without it doing this. It made it frustrating to continue that I ended up uninstalling the game.

The game is alright, I definitely see the allure. However, the amount of ads is insane. You get an ad after every single song you play, even if you mess up on the first notes. It's outrageous, you need ads to play songs and you get ads if you play songs, this entire app is a cash cow with no regard for the consumer's enjoyment. It asks you for your music preferences and immediately throws them out the window for pop songs.

Great game, but I have some problems: ads. There are WAAAY too many ads, like when you fail, there is always the option to continue. But it is designed for people usually to immediately after you fail (the button for it is right where the tile that you missed was) and even if you dont click on it, you still get an ad. And most of the songs you have to unlock with ads :( So for that reason, I give you 2 stars.

To be honest. A few years ago this was one of my favorite games. Back then i would have rated it 5 stars. Now though? Not so much. Most of the songs that were available you could unlock after leveling up. There were no ads or this vip thing. It was a fully free game and it was fun. I still love this game. Just not as much as i did before. Not to mention that occasionally the game doesn't register my taps or the game jumps a bit and i miss a tile because of it. It gets quite frustrating.

I mean, it's alright I guess. I'm a band student, so I like to play apps like these to test my reaction time and practice rhythms and stuff. The practice itself isn't super helpful, though it is fun, but sometimes (most times) it feels like this app just throws whatever they want for the rhythms and occasionally certain parts will match up with the actual rhythm/melody/beat or whatever the frick they're trying to focus on. The ads are a major downside. If you don't like ads, DONT DOWNLOAD!!!

It's fun, but the higher levels of each song are literally just sped up versions, and every time you fail you have to watch an ad. Every. Single. Time. Not to mention wanting to play a new song and having to watch an ad to get into it. And it's not like the ads are short either. Of course you could buy premium or be good at the game (good luck with that), but the fact the free version is so f-ing obnoxious is still a problem. Of course the advertisers themselves are obnoxious too, worsening it.

It is a good game at it's core. Very challenging, and pretty fun. Although there are two main drawbacks that totally take away from the experience. Number one: a lot of ads. It's pretty typical for mobile games to have way too many ads, but this has way more than others. Number two: vocalist performances are distracting. Songs are dubbed over with new vocals, and some of them are downright bad. Another thing: VIP access is SUPER overpriced. TL;DR - good game, riddled with ads and bad singing.

It's a pretty good app but there are WAYY too many ads. There's one before you play the song, in the middle of the song, and after your done with the song. The subspriction is too pricey. In some of the songs, you can't even press the tile. Not because its going too fast, but there seems to be some bugs in it. I give it 2 stars since it is pretty fun. I would give this a higher rating if the subscription costed less, there were no or atleast less ads, and if the bugs were fixed.

Okay, I'm going to first explain the advertisements. They're rediculous! After you either screw up you're forst to watch an ad. And I honestly can't tell if this is supposed to be a "piano" game, or a music game. When you choose a song, it doesn't even sound like a piano! It's just the song's audio and you tapping tiles to the rythem of it. It could use some improvement if your going to classify it as a piano game, but if it's just a music game then I suppose it's decent.

Piano tiles is fun, always has been. However, the ad spam is unconsionable. Usually, I wouldn't rate a game down for this, especially if you have a way to bypass the ads through a real world purchase. For example, I paid for Cytus, another rhythm game. I paid once, I paid 5 dollars, and I'll never see ads there again. The subscription to remove ads (which are constant btw) is $6 a WEEK. To put that in perspective, that's $288 a year, which is more than Adobe Photoshop - a professional app.

I dislike this game, no it's not because the gameplay is bad I actually really love the gameplay, but the thing is there are SO MANY ADS Like right after I play one round of a song it has a commercial break and then right when I open up the app ANOTHER commercial and it shoves getting premium in your face like ALL the time, it's annoying! Also sometimes for the background of a song there's AI pictures! As an artist that is EXTREMELY offensive! And it's also really bad for the planet!

It's fun don't get me wrong, the gameplay is smooth, the songs are fun, and there are plenty of songs to choose from but there's 2 things about it, one the constant ads! Every song, every death, every single second, ad ad ad it drives me insane! Two, the battle mode always plays norm or easy songs and rarely any hard or difficult songs and it's annoying.

The game itself is great and all, but, every single time I I miss a tile or Tao the wrong spot, I get an ad. That is very annoying. I get it your doing that for money but it's to much. If I wanna play a song, watch an ad. If I die, watch an ad. The premium is also annoying. If I want to get no ads I have to but premium. It cost to much and it pops up on screen every single minute. I would rate it a 4 or 5 if there were a lot less ads. The ads ruin the game.

When I first got the game, I enjoyed until I started realizing the tricks. The songs are all covers that don't sound like the original artists. You can't get the good songs unless you pay to go premium. And the ADS... you get an ad what feels like every 2 seconds. Also, when you get an ad,if you accidentally click on the ad, it takes you to Google Play. If you don't click on the ad, it pops up and takes you to google play, which is really annoying to click out of. DONT WASTE YOUR TIME!!!!

It would be a fun game if it wasn't so laggy and if there weren't so many ads. Seriously, there are more ads than actual gameplay! You spend a full minute watching an ad to only get a minute into the song before it lags, makes you lose, and then has you watch yet another ad to continue. It's so insanely frustrating. Basically, it's a very fun game in theory, but they're too focused on getting ad revenue to care about how fun it could be.

Great for playing by yourself. However, there are cheaters when playing online that makes it virtually impossible to win. This is frustrating when this could take a full 20 min to complete a battle that should only take 3 minutes. Overall, pretty nice game with the exceptions of ads, hackers, and minor glitches. I wouldn't recommend sharing through Facebook though.

There are a good few songs on here that make me cringe, only because of the singers and the auto tune. At that point i just want an instrumental. Im a bit of a music geek so this kinda stuff is just upsetting to me. Im sorry because I know budget can be tight, but some of those voices need jesus. I just don't want to go to another app because this us the only one with some music that I like. Also, i would like to see a level system to unlock songs instead of unlocking everything by watching ads.

The concept of the actual game is really good, but it's absolutely flooded with ads. Most of the time you play the game, you are actually just watching ads (especially if you are still working on reaction time and hand/eye cordination.) It's more focused on money than the audience. I understand you have to make a profit, but jeez. You have to buy a subscription to play with baasicly no ads and things like that. The game is fine if you are alright with a load of ads, but

star_3.text: I like this game but this is one of the most ad ridden games I've played in a while. You get ads when you want to play a song, to revive, and after every attempt at a song. Also, it's so incredibly annoying sometimes when I literally click a tile but it won't register that I did. Ex is SAD! by X. I'm on a new gen Samsung. It's sort of throws me off how some songs are normal voices & others are covers. The good sides are that the songs are appropriately rated and there's a lot to choose from.

I like this game, but its annoying that it won't load a song if I don't have internet. It advertised that you can play it offline but that's really only if you buy the premium. Additionally, sometimes the songs started lagging and makes me miss a note or it doesnt register it when I tap a note. I have a Galaxy A16 (Samsung) but I dont know if that affects anything. However, I do enjoy this game because I love music and it is fun and engaging.

I like it 😁 it's fun. but it has too many ads. I don't like games with random ads. it's would be one thing if you watched an ad for a reward (which you do some of the time) it would be fine. also this app died NOT have enough songs. I got this app because the ad showed specific songs, but when I installed it, the songs weren't available. also, many, many songs that I like aren't available either. add more songs and limit as and this with be a 5 star review but for now, 3 ⭐ ⭐ ⭐

I downloaded the game because I played it a lot when I was a kid. Im not a fan of the ads that stop you in the middle of the song or how after you beat the first 3 speed increases, it just freezes when you get to the last 3 really fast speeds. I have to exit the app, and it doesn't even save my progress. I would rate higher if it at least didnt freeze on me.

I like this game, but there's TOO MANY ADS! After a song, one ad. Want to get a new song? One ad. It's just so RIDICULOUS as I cannot even enjoy the game without it. I also wish that there were way more songs, not just pop songs; also the old ones I really love that I cannot find on the app. If all songs were original and not covers, that would make me like the game more. Please fix these issues.

Love the game. Overall, the game is great. Nice songs and and I like how we can compete with other players. I would give this game five stars if we could have more songs at the beginning and more ways to unlock songs other than ads. More ways to earn coins would be nice to! Plus, when I want to unlock a new song, I have to wait sooooo long for the data to install. But it usually fails, and I can't get the song. Also, the songs aren't from the real creator it's a fake song. Don't recommend it.

Overall, It's a pretty good game. The only problem is, that there are. SO. MUCH. ADS. Every single time I die and refuse to watch an ad to pick my spot back up, I end up watching an ad anyways! This game is better on my phone, with less ads too! But just because us chromebook and laptop players don't wanna play it on phones, we end up getting unfair treatment than the phone players? It's kinda bullcrap. I like the songs and all. But I just think we could do with less ads. Overall I'm giving 3.

My experience with this game was great... except for the vibrating when I play a song. I tried everything I could in my settings to stop the vibrating as it is annoying and less enjoyable to play. In addition, I think most of these songs are old hits from 2018. Other than that, the song selectuon is optional to change, but I would love to see some recent hits. If you really fix the vibrating, I will definitely edit this and change my rating to a 5-star. Thank you for reading.

WAY too many ads. Also, can you add an option to insert your own song into the game using AI (It would be easier that way) so we can have any song we want. Also, it would be cool if you made the app compatible with a piano that you make (more profit!). Also you can make some levels with more or less rows of tiles (to make it so people have to use thumbs). In conclusion, this is a good game, but there is lots of room for improvement. Also, stop it with the auto tune

Just like the title of this game, I'm giving this three stars. The graphics are clean enough, but the songs sound kinda odd (like they were trying to avoid copyright, but it ends up sounding kinda bootleggy and Kids Bop-ish), and the fact that their definition of "hard" is just playing the songs faster is silly. The ads are ridiculous, too. Playing a song once to get a full ranking? Cool. Twice? Just fine. Three times? Overkill. Overall, I'd say play it if you want, but it's just not for me.

Okay, I used to LOVE piano tiles and I would play it every day. I decided to download piano tiles for fun and honestly I think people are being greedy. You get 2 songs for free and then you either have to watch an ad for every song you want or pay for the VIP. You also have to watch an ad every time you want to play a song and after you finish a song. Honestly I think it is stupid. Overall I'd still say it's decent (sort of) but PLEASE make it so there are less ads.

I like the game, trust me I do.The song selection is also good because it has a lot of songs that I like.Same for the genre of the music the game offers. But here's the thing, there's an absurd amount of ads. Everytime I play a song there's an ad, and then after the song there's an ad. It's just too much. If there were no ads then it would be a whole day different thing, but after continuous ads it gets so overwhelming and then after time you're not going to want to play.Overall plz remove ads.

Is the game fun? Yes. Can there be input lag problems? Yes. Can I in good faith approve of the constant firehose of adverts? No. I could understand a couple here and there, but no. One when you load the game, and another 2 at a time after each and every time a level ends. Plus another ad to optionally continue without restarting, and another to unlock songs. Or you avoid it by paying a monthly subscription. Thanks, but no thanks.

this is a pretty good app and all but I only give 3 ⭐ because there are WAY WAY WAY too many ads. like I hit play, ad then I finish the song, ad then in will just be browsing, looking for a song, and then an ad pops up. This is really annoying, so I'll turn off the Wi-Fi, but I cant play anything. Magic 1 was better bc there was not as many ads, and it wasn't lyrics music. Also, the faster you played in MT1 the faster the song went and that was cool! so yeah. this app is quite disappointing 😞

I wrote this app because it's a good concept and all, and I'm fine with the ads, in my opinion it's not too much, but the only reason I didn't do 4 star(or 5 star) is because, it doesn't have songs that are lesser known, like I searched for wilbur soot(musician/songwriter) or lovejoy(band) and found nothing, it does not have lesser known bands/songs and it really troubles me

At first when you're playing the first song, it's good, but once you fail or reach 3 stars and you're done, it just feels like a money grab because in order to unlock new songs, you have to see a ad. I just got a notification saying that diamonds can be used to buy lots of songs but when I scroll, you need to play an ad for every. Single. Song. I'm gonna install it once I get news that you can use diamonds to buy songs, but for now, it's staying uninstalled

Probably half, the game is great, but so far I've only found a few songs I like. I'm writing this review while I'm still a bit new to the game, I think that the menu could be organized a bit better so it's less confusing for beginning players. And then the ads.. There are ads everywhere, I could understand a few, but I cam hardly play without getting my soul sold to TikTok. And most of the game/ads will take you somewhere you don't want to be. Good game, too many ads, hard to navigate.

This game is fun overall but the adds are so annoying! Anytime you mess up one note you can either click to watch a add to continue, but if you don't you still have to watch an add anyway. The game is fun, and challenging as it speeds up. The song choices are not the best. I am a Christian and lots of those songs I don't listen to. That is a bummer.

The app has too many ads and the app purposely doesn't register taps. I cleaned my screen, still didn't register. Too many ads for the songs too. Keep going after losing? Watch an ad. Want to end the song after losing? Yeah since you didn't want to watch an ad to restart, how about you watch one afterwards. To unlock songs you must also watch another ad. I understand the situation with getting people to buy premium to keep songs of popular artists but it's too pushy and unattractive

Its a really fun game and it would definitely be my go to game for roadtrips. But the main reseon I deleted it is because the ads. I don't mind ads from time to time and I understand they help with the development. The ads on the game are WAY to long. Every advertisement I got was about a minute long, and the banner is 15 seconds long. In summary shorter ads and less frequent ads I would be nice.

star_4.text: The game is good until I get to the sped up bit then it just stops for me I don't know why. I've tried to close and reopen it but it doesn't work. But I think K-Pop Demon Hunters songs should be on there because me and my friend LOVE K-Pop Demon Hunters. Here is a tip, if you are at somewhere with wifi and you connect to it disconnect to it to not get so many ads.

Really fun, and it's nice that I can transfer my data from phone to phone. However, I press a tile and it doesn't register that I did. I remember it was a problem on Monody, maybe other songs, and it was a problem on both of my phones. I got a new phone and now apparently can't last 10 seconds, but that may partially be my fault. Overall, good game.

I noticed that when the songs speed up the audio is significantly faster than the tile movement even when the song is at it's regular speed. it's not in sync and it's especially obvious in certain songs like Bones where there are parts that change pitch quickly and the corresponding tile section happens seconds after. I personally don't like it. so if that peeves you probably don't get this game (also ads are consistent and after every. single. song.)

Pretty good, but ads Those game is pretty fun and when you have maybe 15 minutes to spare, it's a good game to play, especially when you're offline. However, there are LOTS of ads. It is possible to skip them with Android (pressing the triangle button twice in a row 😜) but if you use Apple, then you'd have to buy VIP to not have ads. (And somtimes you can't skip them on Android either). Other than the ads, this game is fun to play and challenges yourself. 😀

Ok, so I love this game so much, it's so addictive and I could play all the different songs for hours! But there is one big problem, there are so many ads!!! Like after every other song an ad pops up and you have to wait at least 5 seconds to x out of it which can get really frustrating!! I would for sure give this game five stars if the ad level would go down but besides that this game is really fun and I totally recommend it!

The experience is really nice! I just wish there were fewer ads. And more music options without having to watch an ad. I love most of the songs on here, but there's always an ad icon right beside it. If there were fewer ads, I'd probably give five stars. The levels get challenging. Easy- Extreme. It challenges your brain. And the songs are really nice. I recommend this game for any age range.

This game is overall great! The only things I don't like about this game is ads, not as many songs as I'd like, and glitches. The game comes with like, a "normal" amount of ads but even that's a little much. Almost all of my favorite songs are not on this and I really wish you would make a song updates sometimes soon. And I will randomly be hiting keys and they'll just not register as me tapping them. But other than that I really like this game and I hope that lots of other people do to.

Magic Tiles 3 is great, but here's one thing: Speed-Up Lag. Sometimes, when I play a song in regular-speed mode (which is how you first play the song), it speeds it up for no reason. I'm not talking about how when you're done with the song you play it again, but faster, I mean sometimes when you're still playing the song in its regular speed, it randomly speeds it up which makes it very annoying and disappoints me. PLEASE FIX THIS!!

Very fun and a very hard game. But once you get used it, it's pretty easy. Lots of ads but if you turn off your wifi then it won't put any but then you can't save yourself, which isn't that bad. The only thing that sucks is that some of the songs are locked for an ad or you just wait. Love this game magic tiles was one of the first apps I probably downloaded because of what I've seen online and it looked fun. Hope this helped!

I love this game! I just think that there's to many ads,but the game itself is so fun! It asks you what music you like so you can play to music you like! It gets harder and harder once you play more of it. But there are some lags and glitches sadly. So I think its a fun game besides the glithes\lags,ads,and had songs at first. Have a good day! 👋🏽

It's a fun game that I've played for a while, but there is one issue. Amanotes now has everything cost an ad to unlock. I don't mind watching the ads to unlock the songs, but the problem is that because they did that, their in-game currency and XP systems are now useless. So it's a good game, just don't bother watching the ads for diamonds, coins, or XP boosts.

Really fun game!! But there is one problem. For every song you have to watch an ad, or have VIP to get it. And vip costs 6 bucks a week! And the ads are a little crazy. Except if you turn off your wifi. I turned off my wifi and had no ads, and I could still play. But without getting new songs of course. So overall, pretty good game! Note: When your playing, DEFINITELY wear headphones. They make the game easier to play.

Amazing game! The music is fun to listen to and the tiles ... Are the perfect speed! I like when games go really fast and intense there are only 2 downsides I will start with minor than major, the minor is on the tutorial, I didn't like how the music was all glitchy but I'm sure we can all suck it up and get used to it. Now the major, THE ADDS have to be less! So please stop that! Overall amazing game I recommend it! 😁😁

The app didn't sense my touch (multiple times), even if I don't choose to watch an ad to have a checkpoint, it still forces me to watch an ad and still makes me restart. The app also gave me a commercial break when I was on the third speed up, and whenever it gives me a commercial break, it makes me restart, all of these things have happened multiple times. And my phone registers touch very very well. I do really like this game and whoever created it had an amazing idea for the game. It's a g...

This is overall a good game. But there are just a couple things I could do without. 1) Like almost every game ads. And if I'm unlucky enough the ad will freeze and kick me out of the game. 2) The songs are either to slow or to fast like you should add a difficulty thing so we can choose how hard we want it to be. But despite all this it's a fun game but if you read this please fix all this!

It's a great game, but the ads are insane. I'm fine with one when you want to unlock a song, but after every stinkin song is nuts! And sometimes, after I watch an ad to continue a song, it takes me off just to play a " commerical break " which actually means " we are pulling you off just for a stupid ad. " Please please please! Fix this problem.

A fun game, but way too many adds, I get that popular games may need a bit more, but this is just way too much, it really nails the endless-sped up song and other than the adds it is really fun. I wish that you could get other genres or even just one other without buying premium, You also should update the songs so where there not just knockoffs of the originals. I don't see why you have to have premium to get other genres eather. A solid game, if it wasn't for ads it would probably be 5 stars

It's addictive and stimulating and fun, the only issue I have at all is that the audio is ever so slightly off. Not in tempo or anything like that, but the actual voice singing the song is just slightly the wrong key, or something. It's barely noticeable and maybe necessary for the right to use it in the game or something, but it's a little uncanny to hear a song you know that's off by just the slightest amount. Besides that, great game!

Soooo... Let's just say that I was or used to be a huge fan of piano tiles and piano itself. I mean, I'm still a fan but, I'm a bit worried about the ads. The ads do work but whenever it ends, it turns black. Like the whole screen turns black. With this problem, I have Uninstalled this app. I can't play if it doesn't allow me to play my favorite songs, which I have to unlock by watching ads. I'm a bit disappointed on some changes that happen to my (used to be) favorite game.

I play this game every so often, just a regular amount, mainly on my iPad. I'm fast, so I don't die often and get attacked by ads every 20 seconds, if you do you have what we call a ✨skill issue✨. But still, people are right, theres wayyy to many ads, and honestly if your gonna give a ad when we decline it for reviving, just revive us or don't play the ad because then it just isn't fair. Otherwise no other issues! (besides the fact that some people ruin the song, isn't your fault though)

star_5.text: This is mostly a really, really great game. I love how it's kind of a way to listen to music for free if you're good at the levels. One specific issue I did want to address, though, is in the specific level with the song called Sunflower, which beginners normally play. When you get to the third crown, it completely glitches out and doesn't let you play it. And that's problematic for beginners who want go learn how to play the game with an easy level. Edit: They fixed it! Thank you!

I love this game a lot, I started playing it again bc I played it a LOT when I was younger. There are a lot of ads, but I guess that is necessary to keep the game running. Also, just an idea not a problem, I think it would be very nice for Bluetooth users to add a setting where we can adjust audio timing to help with bt latency. Ty devs!

Despite having read the other reviews, I downloaded the game and (suprise!) Had ABSOLUTELY NO PROBLEMS with the game. You do not have to watch multiple ads to play one song. I only had to watch ONE ad and after I played the song found that it was unlocked. If you have seen this review, this game is 100% better than other reviews have made it out to be. Hope this helps.

Magic TILES 3 is AMAZING !! I've learned to use both hands pretty well and I love the music!! Best thing of all...you don't need money to play different songs! These songs are not the greatest Hits, but the music is relaxing and fun!! Never thought I could play music until Amanotes came out with all these music apps and more need for experience...it comes from repeating song until you reach 3 stars. I use a lot of ads to help me and they offer 5 free diamonds, to buy songs, after watching an ad.

This app is amazing! I remember having it on my Fire iPad and I loved it so much! Ads are pretty much optional and the developers aren't desperate for money, so they decide to to spam players with ads. I understand that y'all need ads to keep the game up, and that's fine with me. I'm satisfied with his game, and I hope to see it grow one day. Thank you all for making this amazing game for many people to experience!

If you decide to spend the money to buy the game it's so much fun. So, you play at normal speed on round 1 then play the same song at double speed.. then again even faster and so on until you eventually fail. The paid version of this game is just awesome. The free version is lack luster because of the grid lock adds as I stated in a 2019 review.

This is literally THE BEST piano tiles game out there. It is addictive, unique, and it doesn't bombard you with ads. I've played almost every piano tiles game downloadable, and this it the only one I would rate 5 stars. Keep up the good work, devs! And I actually have a song suggestion: Scarlet Fire by Otis MacDonald. It is copyright free, so no lawsuits if it's used by the app, and it's awesome. If you don't add it, I understand, but please do. I would personally love it. Thanks for this app!

I love magic tiles 3 and always have since I was younger such fun songs and everything, however I don't love that they have added an ad for in-between the song speeding up. And how when I got a new phone all of my game progress had been erased. I had magic tiles easily over 3 years with crowns on most songs I owned but all the songs I had or earned are not earned anymore. kinda depressing but love the game!

I love it because it helps with stimulation and my movements so if somebody having a hard time they can play this game and relax also and keep your mind active and healthy so I advised this game five stores because it's really deserve it if it's too challenging then well you could keep practicing and make yourself better but if you just love music this game is awesome for you too because it has music in there and people sometimes love the sound of music so why are y listening to the music you.

For me, honestly it was very stress relieving, which is my opinion, I play this for fun when I feel stressed mostly, but I do play for fun a lot! I would recommend this game! The only thing I don't like is the amount of ads but besides that this game is awesome 😎!

Great game! One thing tho, can you add more songs? There are a lot but there aren't any of the songs i listen too. I know creating games and adding things to it is hard but i would like some more songs. If you can't, that's okay! Update: A big thanks to the developers for putting more songs!

this is a game I played as a kid and it gave me nostalgia. but every time there's an ad its the same ad. it doesn't do a different ad. its annoying. but overall I rlly like it and I love music so yea.

I've been playing this game for quite a long time and it seems to never disappoint, but not every thing is all good,the game has waay too many commercial breaks,as in adds,that's the only problem from this game though that I know of since it's that awesome and fun to play

I've been playing games like these for a LONG time, this is probably my favorite one! i do say, you should add some more grunge songs, like maybe some Nirvana, System of a Down, maybe even KoRn! any grunge or metal is cool to me, have a good day, and keep up the great work! 🤟😼

it's really good and I enjoy playing it all the time, it's the songs though,most I don't really know even though I selected the genre of music, could you maybe possibly add the song creep u or a Radiohead songs (I KNOW MAKING GAMES ARE HARD BUT PLEASE IF YOU CAN)

Really love the app, and I have been playing it since my childhood. the only thing I would love if u guys add is a feature where u can create custom sonfs from your device. I hope you add this in the app and I really don't want you guys to make it premium, u can have it like require to watch an ad or smthn to add a custom song from your device. Thank you, and will be waiting for a reply and update!!

very good but to much ads and it would be better if I add mute settings to bcs if we are Muslim like me and Ramadan is going on and we want to play so we canute it and play some nasheed or you can also add it naat or nasheed in yours but still 5 bcs it's v good id recommend to a friend thank you very much for your cooperation
Very good Finger concentration✨✨, Love to play this game 💖💖 But too many ads ,, I think the ads should be reduced a little!! But the game is very fantastic🤞

I like the game very much I can listen to songs if I have skill and also fic the rush E song speed it's unplayable and I like that the game is free to play friendly by completing quest you have a chance to get free vip honestly If I could rate it 10 star i would
Magic tiles is one of the few games I love in the past I would have avoided it but now I friken love this game its fun to compete and just play alone to be honest its also super relaxing 🤩😍🤩
